headline: South Sudan floor confirmation. New UNMISS Special Representative Anita Kiki Gbeho appointed April 10 — institutional-leadership transition is a notable signal but not yet scorable. UNMISS documented 280,000+ displaced in Jonglei; ~8 million people at risk of acute hunger; aerial bombardments and political deadlock among Revitalized Peace Agreement signatories continuing. May 9 inaugural session under new UNMISS leadership is the next monitor trigger. Floor maintained.
key_evidence: New UNMISS Special Representative Anita Kiki Gbeho (Ghana) appointed April 10 2026 — first major institutional change in window.
280,000+ displaced in Jonglei from armed confrontations and aerial bombardments (UN press SC16290).
Nearly 8 million people at risk of acute hunger (Al Jazeera April 28).
UNMISS calling for immediate cessation of hostilities; parties must recommit to Revitalized Peace Agreement.
May 9 inaugural UNMISS session under new leadership — next-cycle monitor trigger.

evidence.finding: 280,000+ displaced in Jonglei; restricted humanitarian access; political deadlock among RPA signatories.
Nearly 8 million people at risk of acute hunger per NGO assessment.
UNMISS calls for immediate cessation of hostilities and return to RPA framework.

scoring_rationale.BND: 1 unchanged (floor). RPA signatory deadlock sustains floor-level B3 Scope Clarity.

negativeSignals: 280K+ displaced; ~8M food-insecure; aerial bombardment continuing; political deadlock among RPA signatories; humanitarian access restricted.
positiveSignals: New UNMISS leadership (Gbeho) — institutional signal, not scorable until operational evidence appears.
sector_context: Floor-cluster countries (Sudan, South Sudan, Myanmar, Israel, North Korea, Eritrea) all confirmed at floor this cycle. South Sudan distinguished by new external-mission leadership; this is an institutional-trajectory signal but the underlying suffering pattern remains floor-level.
open_actions_resolved: Gbeho appointment captured as institutional signal (not yet scorable)
open_actions_carried: Capture May 9 UNMISS inaugural-session evidence in next cycle
Floor exit criteria not in trajectory
